member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.IResistanceOffsetHandler
member.summary: Business Logic for enabling user-defined resistance offsets for DC tests.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.IResistanceOffsetHandler.GetResistanceOffset(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets resistance offset for selected pin from Shared Storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Double showing offset for current pin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.IResistanceOffsetHandler.TryGetResistanceOffset(System.String,System.Double@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets resistance offset for selected pin from Shared Storage.
member.param: Double showing offset for current pin.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Boolean showing specified pin offset existence.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.Parser
member.summary: Parse the incoming Json file and loads data to shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.Parser.ParseAndStore(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Parse the incoming json file. Load to shared storage.
member.param: The content of the json file.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.ResistanceOffsetFile.LoadBoardsInput.TiuName
member.summary: Gets or sets the TIU name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.ResistanceOffsetFile.LoadBoardsInput.Duts
member.summary: Gets or sets the Duts List.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.ResistanceOffsetFile.LoadBoardsInput.DutsInput.DutID
member.summary: Gets or sets the Duts List.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.ResistanceOffsetFile.LoadBoardsInput.DutsInput.Resistances
member.summary: Gets or sets the Resistances List.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.Parser.ResistanceOffsetFile.LoadBoardsInput.DutsInput.ResistancesInput.ResistanceOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the ResistanceOffsetHandler value.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.ResistanceOffset.ResistanceOffsetAlephable.ParseInputFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The session context of this operation.
